content.text: {"is_legal":true,"action_type":"stealth","summary":"Talia slips silently past the goblin camp.","reasoning_summary":"Cunning Action applies.","roll_requests":[{"owner":"player","visibility":"public","expression":"1d20+5","purpose":"Stealth check"}],"state_effects":[{"effect_type":"append_public_event","target":"encounter:goblin-camp-rogue","value":"Talia vanishes into the underbrush."},{"effect_type":"set_phase","target":"encounter:goblin-camp-rogue","value":"encounter_complete"},{"effect_type":"set_encounter_outcome","target":"encounter:goblin-camp-rogue","value":"de-escalated"}],"rule_references":[]}
